basic_info.headline: PhD Candidate (Trustworthy AI) | Research / Applied Scientist | ML Security & Explainability | IIT (Silver Medalist) | Ex-LG, Ex-IBM
basic_info.about:
I am a final-year PhD candidate in Computing Science at Umeå University, Sweden, working on Trustworthy Artificial Intelligence with a focus on explainability, robustness, and security of machine learning models. My research spans anomaly detection, backdoor attacks and defenses, and reliable learning under data contamination, across both vision and language models.

Previously, I worked as a Senior Research Engineer at LG Soft India, where I applied Knowledge Graphs and NLP to build question-answering systems for real-world applications.

I hold an M.Tech ( Silver Medalist) in Mathematics and Computing from IIT Patna, and was an exchange student at TU Darmstadt, Germany. My academic training and research experience cover Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Multimodal Learning, Probability, and Statistics, with strong emphasis on mathematical foundations and empirical rigor.

Before my master’s degree, I spent 4.5 years at IBM as a System Engineer (Mainframe Application Developer), gaining solid industry experience in building and maintaining large-scale, production-grade systems.

🔍 I am actively interested in roles that require deep research thinking and strong implementation skills, such as:
	•	Research Scientist
	•	Applied Scientist
	•	Research Engineer
	•	Machine Learning Scientist

🛠 Technical Skills:
LLMs · PyTorch · Python · SQL · Machine Learning · Probability & Statistics · NLP · Computer Vision

experience.title: Senior Research Engineer
experience.description: Worked on Knowledge graph embeddings based QA end-to-end system. Proposed and implemented solution to build and enhance LG product specific korean Question Answering system using ML/DL based approach .

experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer
experience.description: I worked as an ML Engineer at Duru Corporation for LG Soft India.

experience.title: Research Assistant
experience.description: As a DAAD KOSPIE Scholar I worked at UKP Lab, TU Darmstadt. During the course of the internship I worked on the problem related to Self-supervised Image Caption Generation problem using a multi modal approach. Image Caption generation problem lies in the common zone of both NLP and Computer Vision. During this time,  I worked with Autoencoders, Convolutional Networks, RNNs(LSTM) , Generative Adversarial networks , word embed-dings.

experience.title: Research Intern
experience.company: Tata Research Development and Design Centre (TRDDC)
experience.description: The problem was to extract mentions of "Treatment" relation from PubMed abstracts. I have developed a solution using interface in Markov Logic Networks(MLN) to combine multiple NLP pre-processing inputs like SRL and Dependency parsing, along with domain knowledge rules specified in first-order logic format.
